chars.sk: Moc rau - cao ra Beard Hair. Rau cang dai giu am cang tot. Thit toc dung hoi mau va lam Meat Effigy.
chars.cl: CO CHE RAU: Rau trai qua 3 giai doan. GD1 (ngay 4): rau ngan - giu am 15s, cao duoc 1 toc. GD2 (ngay 8): rau dai - giu am 45s, cao duoc 3 toc. GD3 (ngay 16): rau dep - giu am 135s, cao duoc 9 toc. Mua dong rau moc nhanh hon 1.5x. Dung Beard Hair: (1) Da hoi mau (Beard Hair + Da lua): hoi 20-25 HP trong 20s. (2) Meat Effigy: 4 toc + 40 HP max - khi chet hoi sinh tai cho.
tips: Cao rau ngay 4/8/16 - giai doan cuoi cho 9 toc + giu am 135s
Rau mua dong moc nhanh - giu am tot
Thit toc lam da hoi mau + Meat Effigy
Nhan vat toan dien - khong diem yeu

chars.sk: Bat lua vo han + Bernie. Mien nhiem sat thuong lua. TT tang khi gan lua.
chars.cl: BAT LUA (Willow Lighter): vo han do ben. Dung de: dot duoc, dot cay lay than, dot ke thu, suoi am. BERNIE: Gau bong dac biet. Khi TT < 30%, Bernie tu dong bien lon, tan cong ke thu, hoi TT cho Willow. Bernie co the sua bang chi + lua. Mua he: Willow khong bi nong them khi gan lua. TT 120 - thap nhat game: can hoa (12TT), nam xanh nau (+15TT), mat ong (+15TT).
tips: Bat lua vo han - thay duoc, suoi am, dot ke thu
Bernie tu bao ve khi TT < 30%
TT 120 - luon co hoa nam xanh hoi TT
Mua he loi the: khong so lua

chars.sk: 3 trang thai: Wimpy (yeu) / Normal / Mighty (manh). Tap ta de Mighty. No cang manh.
chars.cl: MIGHTY (Doi 225-300): 2x sat thuong, 200 HP, di nhanh. WIMPY (Doi 0-100): 0.75x sat thuong, di cham, so bong toi + so quai. TAP: Dumbbell (go) co ban. Golden Dumbbell (vang) nhanh. Gembell (ngoc) nhanh nhat. AN: an gap 1.5x nguoi thuong. Can 2 Crock Pot liên tuc.
tips: Giu Doi 225-300 de Mighty: 2x sat thuong
Tap Golden Dumbbell nhanh nhat
So bong toi khi Wimpy - luon co duoc
An gap ruoi - can 2 Crock Pot

chars.sk: Abigail + pha thuoc Ectoherbology. 0.75x sat thuong gay ra. 0.75x hao TT.
chars.cl: ABIGAIL: Goi bang hoa. Hoa no ban dem hoac gan xac chet. Abigail danh AoE - manh nhat ban dem + gan chet. THUOC: Spectral Cure-All (hoi Abigail 600 HP), Distilled Vengeance (phan 30%), Vigor Mortis (+50% ST Abigail), Nightshade Nostrum (+300 HP max Abigail). Wendy danh 0.75x (yeu), bu Abigail. Hao TT 0.75x trong toi.
tips: Abigail AoE farm nhien ong dam lay sieu nhanh
Pha thuoc cho Abigail: hoi mau, phan don, tang ST
Wendy danh yeu - can Abigail ganh boss
Hao TT cham trong toi - loi the ban dem

chars.sk: Circuit. KHONG an Gear tang stats. Scan sinh vat = Bio Data = Circuit. Uot mat HP. Set hoi mau.
chars.cl: Luu y: WX-78 da rework. KHONG an Gear tang stats nua! Dung CIRCUIT. BIO SCANALYZER: scan sinh vat -> Bio Data -> che Circuit. 6 khe Circuit, moi 90s sac 1 pin: Hardy (+50HP), Super-Hardy (+150HP), Processing (+40TT), Super-Processing (+100TT +2TT/ph), Acceleration (+10% SPD), Super-Accel (+20%), Thermal (dieu nhiet), Electrification (set khi danh), Beanbooster (5HP/30s), Illumination (sang). An Gear: hoi 60TT+75Doi+50Mau (ko tang max). Uot -3 den -9 HP/s.
tips: DUNG Circuit - KHONG an Gear tang stats
Scan sinh vat = Bio Data -> che Circuit
Uot = mat HP/s - can chong uot xuan
Set danh +100 HP, Winona Generator sac pin

chars.sk: Biet het recipes. Xuat ban sach. Mat ngu. Da day yeu.
chars.cl: Khong can Science Machine - da biet het recipes. SACH: Birds of the World (goi chim), Horticulture (chin cay), On Tentacles (xuc tu bao ve), The End is Nigh (goi set), Sleepytime Stories (gay ngu), Applied Silviculture (farm go). Mat ngu - ko dung duoc Tent/Bed Roll. Can hoa + nam hoi TT. Da day yeu: do an oi thiu hoi it.
tips: Khong can Science Machine - tiet kiem
Horticulture farm cap toc, On Tentacles bao ve base
Mat ngu - can hoa nam hoi TT lien tuc
Da day yeu - an do nau chin

chars.sk: Chien binh Viking. Battle Spear+Helm tu dau. Danh nhau hoi mau+TT. Hat. Chi an thit.
chars.cl: Battle Spear (42.5dmg), Battle Helm (80%giam). Gay ra x1.25, nhan vao x0.75. Danh quai hoi 25% ST thanh mau+TT. HAT: Weaponized Warble (+10%ST), Heartrending Ballad (hoi mau dong doi), Clear Minded Cadenza (hoi TT), Fireproof Falsetto (giam ST lua). Chi an thit! Bat dau voi 4 thit.
tips: Battle Spear+Helm tu ngay dau
Danh quai hoi mau - lien tuc chien
Hat buff dong doi
Chi an thit - can nguon thit on dinh

chars.cl: Lucy: chat cay x1.25, vo han do ben, noi chuyen. BIEN HINH: thanh Wereness 100 diem. (1) Werebeaver: cua cay, dao da, farm sieu toc. (2) Weremoose: sung huc, giam 30% ST, danh boss. (3) Weregoose: chay+luot nuoc. Kitschy Idol: Beaver/Moose/Goose - chu dong bien. Full Moon: tu dong bien.
tips: Lucy chat cay nhanh+noi chuyen - vo han ben
Werebeaver farm go, Weremoose danh, Weregoose chay
Kitschy Idol kiem soat bien hinh
Full Moon tu dong bien - chuan bi

chars.sk: HP thap = ST cao. Alarming Clock danh xa. Dong ho teleport. Cang gia cang manh.
chars.cl: Alarming Clock (1 gear+1 dong): danh xa. Backtrek Watch: teleport ve danh dau. Rift Watch: teleport den dong minh. HP max giam dan (gia di). 50HP = x2 ST, 25HP = x3 ST. Cang gia ST cang cao nhung cang de chet.
tips: Alarming Clock: danh xa - an toan nhat
Backtrek Watch: teleport
HP 50% = x2 ST, 25% = x3 - can nhac
Cang gia cang manh nhung HP giam

chars.sk: Nuoc ech. Merm King. Merm linh. Chi an rau+ca. Ko so am.
chars.cl: Merm King: xay trong dam lay, Merm linh giup farm+bao ve. Ko so am - loi the xuan. Chi an rau+ca - can Farm Soil+Fish Farm. Fish Farm: 8 day+2 da.
tips: Xay Merm King som - Merm linh giup farm
Chi an rau+ca - trong+cau
Ko so am - xuan loi the
Merm King cang to cang nhieu linh

chars.sk: Quy. Soul Hop dich chuyen. Linh hon = mau. Hoi mau dong doi.
chars.cl: Soul Hop: nhay qua song, vach da. Ton 1 linh hon. Thu thap tu xac chet. An linh hon: +20HP, -5TT. Co the an 5 cai 1 luc (+100HP). Hoi mau dong doi = keo tha linh hon. Ko an duoc thuc an thuong. Chet neu het linh hon - luon giu 5+. Doi luon 150.
tips: Soul Hop di chuyen nhanh qua moi dia hinh
Luon giu 5+ linh hon - ko co = chet
Linh hon hoi +20HP -5TT, hoi dong doi
Ko an duoc thuc an - chi song bang linh hon

chars.sk: Cay - trong hat ko can cuoc. Phan = HP. So lua x3.
chars.cl: Trong hat truc tiep - ko can cuoc. Phan bon hoi HP+thuc cay. Compost Wrap: hoi 40HP. Bramble Husk: giap phan don. Bramble Trap: bay ST vung. Lua: ST x3 - xuan hang. Xuan: mua tu hoi HP.
tips: Trong cay ko can cuoc
Phan bon hoi HP+thuc cay
ST lua x3 - xuan hang
Xuan mua hoi mau tu nhien

guide.t: Ngay 1-2: KHOI DAU. Buoc 1: nhat 20 Co + 20 Canh + 10 Da lua + 10 Qua mong. Co va Canh o dong co. Da lua o dat trang/ven nui. Buoc 2: chat 3 cay to = tay -> 12-15 Go. Buoc 3: che Riu (2 canh+2 da), Cuoc (2 canh+2 da), Duoc (2 canh+1 co). Buoc 4: khi mat troi lan, dot Campfire (2 go+3 co) - KO dot = chet. Buoc 5: tham hiem doc bo bien. Tranh Dam lay - xuc tu nguy hiem.

Ngay 3-4: TIM DAT BASE. Tieu chi: gan nuoc (ao/song), gan rung+nui da, gan Pig Village, dat bang. Xay Fire Pit (2 da+12 go) - lua ko tat. Xay 2 Chest (3 go/cai). Bay Tho: Trap (6 canh) dat tren hang tho. Lam Backpack (4 co+4 canh) - them 8 o chua do.

Ngay 5-6: VANG + SCIENCE. Tim Vang: nui da dap da vang = Cuoc. Hoac dao Mo (can than ma). Science Machine (1vang+4go+4da). Che: Xeng (2canh+2da) - dao bui ve base, Bua (3canh+6da) - dap Pig House, Giao (2canh+2da+4go) - vu khi, Ao go (8go+2co) - giap.

Ngay 7-8: ALCHEMY + CROCK POT. Alchemy Engine (4vang+2go+2da) nang cap Science. Crock Pot (3go+6da+2than) - nau an quan trong nhat! Than: dot cay = duoc. 3 Drying Rack (3go+3than+3co) - phoi thit kho. Bay nhen: dat bay sat to nhen, sang ra nhen chet.

Ngay 9-10: LONG CHIM + NAU AN. Bird Cage (2vang+2lua+8canh) - chim de trung. Meatballs: 1 thit+3 bang = +62.5Doi. Bacon&Eggs: 2trung+2thit = +75Doi+20Mau. Honey Ham: 2thit+2mat = +75Doi+30Mau. Pierogi: 1trung+1thit+1rau+1nam = +37.5Doi+40Mau.

Ngay 11-13: CHUAN BI DONG - QUYET DINH. Mua dong ngay 21-22. BAT BUOC: Thermal Stone (10da+3da lua+1da tim) - hoi lua giu am 120s. Ice Box (1gear+2da+4van) - giu thuc an. Mu am: Winter Hat (4 da tho+2long vu+2long thu) giu am 240s. 60+ go, 20+ thit kho, 10+ mat ong. Giet Koalefant: theo dau chan -> 8 thit + Voi lam Puffy Vest.

Ngay 14-16: CUNG CO. Den long (2 dom dom+3 canh) - sang di dong. Mu tho mo (1 dom dom+1 vo+2 vang) - ranh tay cam vu khi. Bee Box: bat ong chua ve -> cach base 10-15 o. Farm Soil: cuoc dat -> gieo hat -> ca rot, khoai tay, ngo.

Ngay 17-18: BEARGER DEN. Ngay 20-25. Cach 1: dan vao rung farm go. Cach 2: 2 Ao go + Dam bong (2 thit+2go+1canh) + Mu bong da (1 da+1 dong). DANH: doi Bearger dap -> danh 2 cai -> lui ne. ROI: 8 Thit + Long -> Bearger Vest (240s + hao doi cham 25%).
Ngay 19-20: KIEM TRA LAN CUOI. Thermal Stone? Mu am? Ice Box + 60 go? 20+ thit kho? Ao go + vu khi? Thieu gi chay di kiem. NGAY 21 la dong.

Ngay 21-24 (Dong 1-4): 3 NGAY DAU DONG. Nhiet do 0-5C ngay, -15C dem. Luon giu Thermal Stone hoi lua. Ngay: san, tham hiem. Dem: dot lua to. San: Chim canh cut (Pengull - bo bien bang, trung), Meo rung (Catcoon - rung). Meatballs: 1 thit+3 bang = +62.5 Doi. Dao bang 40+.

Ngay 25-28 (Dong 5-8): MacTusk + DEERCLOPS. MacTusk: nha Eskimo tren dong tuyet -> Rang (Tooth Trap) + Tam o Shanter (+6.7TT/ph). DEERCLOPS ngay 30+. CHUAN BI: 2 Ao go + Mu bong da + Dam bong + 10 thuoc. DANH: doi no dap -> ne -> danh 2 cai -> lui. KO danh gan base. ROI: 8 Thit + Mat -> Eyebrella (chong nang+mua SO1).

Ngay 29-31 (Dong 9-12): CHUAN BI XUAN. Mu mua (4 da tho+2 dau+2 canh) hoac O (6 canh+2 da+2 dau). Eyebrella (tu Mat Deerclops) - chong mua+nang. Cot thu loi (1vang+4da) - set danh chay base. Lau say o dam lay.
Ngay 32-35 (Xuan 1-4): MUA XUAN. Doi mu chong uot ngay. Cot thu loi. San Ech (Frog) gan ao -> dui ech nau Froggle Bunwich (+20 Mau). Ko de do duoi dat. Moose/Goose ngay 37+.
Ngay 36-40 (Xuan 5-9): MOOSE/GOOSE. Ngay 37+. Dau hieu: trung khong lo. DANH: NE don lao sang ben -> danh 3 phat. Mau < 50% -> goi Mossling. ROI: 4 Thit + 3 Dui trong + Long vu.

Ngay 41-45 (Xuan 10-14): THUYEN + DAO MAT TRANG. Row Boat (6 go+4 day+3 dong). Mai cheo. Mang 5+ do an + can cau. Tim dao phat sang tim = Dao Mat Trang. Celestial Orb mo Celestial Champion. Endothermic Fire Pit chuan bi he.

Ngay 46-50 (He 1-5): CHONG NONG. Nhiet 40-80C. Endothermic Fire Pit (2da+4da lua+2da cuoi) - lua xanh lam mat. Thermal Stone hoi lua xanh. ANTLION o Oasis: cho do choi hoac giet. Giet: 3 hit -> NE -> roi 4 Thit + Do trang suc.

Ngay 51-56 (He 6-12): HANG + TAN TICH. Xuong hang: Den long + 5 do an + 2 Ao go + cuoc. Nhiet do on dinh. Tan tich (Ruins) -> Ancient Pseudoscience Station. Thulecite: dap tuong xanh den. Nam xanh luoc (+20 mau, -10TT).

Ngay 57-60 (He 13-16): ENDGAME. FUELWEAVER (Atrium): Weather Pain (4long+1duoi meo) pha khien + Nightmare Amulet danh xuyen + Lazy Explorer teleport. CRAB KING: can ngoc trai tu Crabby Hermit -> bom pha vo. CELESTIAL CHAMPION: 3 phase tren Dao Mat Trang.

boss.t: HP 4000. AoE pha cong trinh. DOI no dap (tay gio) -> ne -> 2 hit Dam bong -> lui. 2 Ao go + Mu bong da + 10 thuoc. KO danh gan base. Roi: 8 Thit + Mat -> Eyebrella.
HP 6000. Cach 1: dan vao rung farm go. Cach 2: 2 hit -> NE quet. Bearger Vest: giu am 240s + hao doi cham 25%. Roi: 8 Thit + Long.
HP 3000. NE lao sang ben (ko chay lui) -> danh 3 phat. Mau <50% goi Mossling. Roi: 4 Thit + 3 Dui trong + Long vu.
HP 27500. KHO. 2 Ao go + Mu bong da + 20 thuoc + Dam bong. Ngu khi ko ai gan. Phun lua + bay dap. Roi: 8 Thit + Vay -> Scalemail.
HP 22500. CUC KHO. 3 Ao go + 2 Mu + 30 thuoc + Dark Sword. Goi ong vo han. Danh vao bung vang. Roi: Royal Jelly + Bundling Wrap.
HP 5000. Can Deer Antler. P1: Klaus+2 huou. P2: xuong ngua danh gan. Roi: 4 Thit + ngoc + blueprint.
HP 3000. A: do choi trong Oasis. B: 3 hit -> NE tung cat. Roi: 4 Thit + Do trang suc (Desert Goggles).
HP 15000. Bao tu doc (gas) - can Mat na khi. AoE nam moc. Roi: 8 Thit + Bao tu.
HP 5000. Sung lao tu thuyen. Mau thap bay nhanh. Roi: 8 Thit + Mo -> thuyen nhanh 15%.
HP 16000. CAN: Weather Pain (pha khien) + Nightmare Amulet (danh xuyen) + Lazy Explorer (teleport). P1 pha 3 khien. P2 danh luc hut TT. P3 danh lien tuc.
HP 2500. 1-2 hit -> ne sung. Giu Ancient Station. Roi: Guardian Horn.
HP 15000. Can ngoc trai (Crabby Hermit). Bom pha vo -> danh than. AoE vo thuyen. Roi: 8 Thit.

base.t: Gan nuoc (ao/song), gan rung+nui da, gan Pig Village, bang phang. Tranh dam lay, xa to ong sat thu.
Fire Pit trung tam. Chest+Ice Box+Crock Pot canh nhau. Hinh tron hoac chu L.
Alchemy+3 Drying Rack+Bird Cage+Lightning Rod+Farm Soil+Bee Box.
Sinh hoat (Fire/Chest/Ice/Crock/Alchemy) + Nong trai + Kho go + Phong thu (Tooth Trap).
Ice Box+60 go+Drying Rack trong nha+thit kho. Chim canh cut lay trung.
Xuong hang gan cau thang. Base phu: Pit+Chest+Ice Box+Endothermic.
Tham co+den duong+tuong da+20 Tooth Trap+Pig House.

autumn.t: [UT1] Nhat 20 Co+20 Canh+10 Da lua+10 Qua mong

winter.t: Mu mua+Cot thu loi - chuan bi xuan

spring.t: Endothermic Fire Pit chuan bi he
